title: Pinnacle West Sets Date for 2021 Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year Financial Results, Webcast/Conference Call
text: PHOENIX--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pinnacle West Capital plans to release its 2021 fourth-quarter and full-year financial results on Friday, Feb. 25, 2022.

title: High Yield Stock Watchlist - January 2022
text: There are 21 stocks on my high yield watchlist for January 2022. The majority of the stocks on my watchlist are currently undervalued based on dividend yield theory.
